products.title: 3.07ct Lab Grown Gemstone Neon Blue Paraiba Halo Ring S925 JR253Y
products.description:
Discover the elegance of lab-grown gemstones combined with the durability of S925 sterling silver. Lab-grown gemstones offer the same stunning beauty and brilliance as natural stones, but with a more sustainable and affordable approach. Paired with premium S925 silver, this ring is not only hypoallergenic and tarnish-resistant, but also built to last, making it perfect for daily wear or special occasions.

This exquisite Paraíba ring features a breathtaking 3.07-carat lab-grown Paraíba gemstone as the center stone, known for its mesmerizing, light blue hue that captures the essence of tropical waters. Surrounded by a halo of smaller stones totaling 5.021 carats, this ring radiates brilliance from every angle. Weighing 6.31 grams, this piece is lightweight yet substantial, delivering a luxurious feel. Paraíba gemstones are renowned for their rare and vibrant color, making this ring a true statement piece that adds a touch of sophistication to any look. and is available in sizes 5 to 7.5 (standard U.S. sizing). Please note that lab-grown colored gemstone rings have an estimated shipping time of 3-15 days.

Key Features:

Lab-Grown Paraíba Gemstone: A stunning 9*7mm 3.07-carat center stone with a rare and radiant light blue color.

Halo Design: Encircled by 5.021 carats of accent stones for added sparkle and elegance.

Premium S925 Sterling Silver: Hypoallergenic, tarnish-resistant, and durable for long-lasting wear.

Lightweight Yet Luxurious: Weighs 6.31 grams, providing a comfortable but substantial feel.

Eco-Friendly and Affordable: Lab-grown gemstones offer an ethical, high-quality alternative to mined stones.

products.title: 3.06ct Natural Peridot Halo Ring S925 JR672Y
products.description:
Embrace the timeless elegance of natural gemstones set in premium S925 sterling silver. Known for its durability and hypoallergenic properties, S925 silver provides a secure and lasting foundation, ensuring this ring will retain its beauty over time. This piece combines natural beauty with expert craftsmanship, making it a stunning addition to any jewelry collection.

At the heart of this ring lies a striking 8x8mm, 3.06-carat natural peridot gemstone, celebrated for its vibrant green hue that symbolizes prosperity and harmony. Surrounding the center stone is a halo of teardrop-cut accent stones totaling 3.47 carats, adding a delicate brilliance and enhancing the radiance of the central peridot. With a total weight of 5.17 grams, this ring offers a comfortable yet luxurious feel, making it a perfect piece for those who appreciate elegance with a touch of nature’s beauty. and is available in sizes 5 to 7.5 (standard U.S. sizing). Please note that lab-grown colored gemstone rings have an estimated shipping time of 3-15 days.

Key Features:

Natural Peridot Center Stone: A stunning 8x8mm, 3.06-carat peridot with a rich green hue.

Teardrop-Cut Accent Stones: 3.47 carats of sparkling stones that beautifully frame the center gemstone.

S925 Sterling Silver Setting: Hypoallergenic, tarnish-resistant, and crafted to endure, offering long-lasting shine.

Comfortable Weight: Weighing 5.17 grams, providing a substantial yet wearable feel.

A Symbol of Harmony: Known for its calming green tone, peridot is believed to bring peace and prosperity.

Add a touch of natural elegance to your collection with this captivating peridot ring, a perfect blend of sophistication and nature’s charm.

Our Men's Moissanite Ring features a striking moissanite gemstone, expertly cut to showcase its extraordinary sparkle. The ring's design is both contemporary and timeless, featuring clean lines and a bold presence.Set in a robust and stylish band, this ring is the perfect blend of sophistication and masculinity, Step into a world of refined elegance and unparalleled brilliance with our Men's Moissanite Ring. making it an ideal accessory for any occasion.

Material: 925 Sterling Silver

Carat Weight: 1.0ct

Color Grade : D

Clarity Grade: VVS1

Cut Grade: Excellent

products.title: 4.8ct Natural Garnet Halo Ring S925 JR675Y
products.description:
Crafted from premium S925 sterling silver, this ring combines durability with elegance, ensuring long-lasting shine and comfort for everyday wear. S925 silver is hypoallergenic and tarnish-resistant, making it the ideal setting for precious gemstones. This piece showcases natural beauty with expert craftsmanship, designed to make a statement.

At its center is a captivating 11x9mm, 4.8-carat natural garnet gemstone, known for its deep, rich red color symbolizing passion and vitality. Surrounding the garnet is a halo of round-cut accent stones, adding a sparkling frame that enhances the beauty of the center stone. The ring also features eight pear-shaped accent stones (four on each side of the band), totaling 5.74 carats, creating a unique and luxurious design. Weighing 6.45 grams, this ring feels substantial yet comfortable, perfect for those who appreciate bold elegance. and is available in sizes 5 to 7.5 (standard U.S. sizing). Please note that lab-grown colored gemstone rings have an estimated shipping time of 3-15 days.

Key Features:

Natural Garnet Center Stone: A large 11x9mm, 4.8-carat garnet with a deep, passionate red hue.

Unique Accent Stone Arrangement: Round-cut stones surround the center, while eight pear-shaped stones (5.74 carats) line the sides for added brilliance.

S925 Sterling Silver Setting: Hypoallergenic, tarnish-resistant, and crafted for long-lasting beauty.

Luxurious Weight: Weighs 6.45 grams, providing a substantial and elegant feel.

Symbol of Passion: Garnet is celebrated for its bold red color, representing love and energy.

Elevate your style with this stunning garnet ring—a perfect fusion of boldness and sophistication.

products.description:

At the center of this stunning ring is an 8x8mm, 2.07-carat round-cut natural garnet, with its deep red hue symbolizing love and strength. The garnet is surrounded by a halo of round-cut accent stones, enhancing its brilliance. Please note that lab-grown colored gemstone rings have an estimated shipping time of 3-15 days.

Key Features:

Additional Small Accent Stones: A row of five round-cut stones on each side of the band (totaling 4.56 carats) for extra sparkle.

Perfect for adding a touch of sophistication to any outfit, this garnet ring is a timeless addition to your jewelry collection.

products.title: 3.95ct Lab-Grown Paraiba Halo Ring S925 JR689Y
products.description:

Surrounding the center stone is a delicate halo of round-cut accent stones, which further amplify the brilliance of the Paraíba. On either side of the band, six round-cut smaller stones are set, creating a symmetrical design that adds extra sparkle. With a total weight of 3.65 grams, this ring offers a perfect balance of elegance and comfort. and is available in sizes 5 to 7.5 (standard U.S. sizing). Please note that lab-grown colored gemstone rings have an estimated shipping time of 3-15 days.

Lab-Grown Paraíba Center Stone: A mesmerizing 10.5x8mm, 3.95-carat pear-cut Paraíba with a serene light blue color.

products.title: Moissanite Wedding Ring for Women
products.description:
Embrace timeless elegance with this delicate Moissanite wedding ring, crafted in high-quality S925 sterling silver with a classic white gold finish. This ring features a unique wave-twist design, symbolizing the intertwined paths of two souls in love. Adorned with a line of sparkling Moissanite stones totaling 0.04 carats, this ring brings a touch of refined sophistication to any look.

Each stone is meticulously set, capturing the fire and brilliance that Moissanite is known for. Inside the band, the "S925" and "0.04CT" markings are engraved to signify its authenticity and quality, making this piece a true celebration of your commitment.

Key Features:
